_comment_top: Global settings — install to ~/.claude/settings.json (Windows/Git Bash). Hook scripts are installed at ~/.claude/ultimate-windows/scripts/. Requires bash (Git Bash) in PATH. See Ultimate-Windows/QUICKSTART.md.
_precedence: Scope precedence (high → low): Managed > Local (.claude/settings.local.json) > Project (.claude/settings.json) > User (this file). Deny rules accumulate across all scopes; first match of deny > defer > ask > allow wins.

attribution._comment: Replaces deprecated includeCoAuthoredBy. Turn off if you don't want Claude in your commit/PR trailers.

env._comment: Only vars verified against official Claude Code docs. cache-fix-wrapper exports CACHE_FIX_* separately — do NOT redefine those here. ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H requires Claude Code v2.1.108+; user is on 2.1.105 so it's commented out. Add once upgraded.

statusLine._comment: Optional statusline script. Remove this block if you don't have statusline.sh installed.

permissions._comment: deny > ask > allow. Deny rules survive --dangerously-skip-permissions. Keep Bash(*) broad but rely on hooks (validate-bash.sh) for the hard blocks since deny-regex is string-match only.

PostToolUse._comment_lsp: Compress verbose cclsp MCP output before it hits agent context (like lean-ctx but for LSP). Uses PostToolUse.updatedMCPToolOutput. Pairs well with lean-ctx if you also install that — they don't overlap.
